revision.text:
{{Country topics | country = Japan | state = {{{state<includeonly>|collapsed</includeonly>}}} | adjective = Japanese | above = *[[Index of Japan-related articles|Index]] *[[Outline of Japan|Outline]]
<!---------------------------------------------------------> | history = {{Navbox |child |groupstyle=padding-left:0.5em;padding-right:0.5em;font-weight:normal; |evenodd=swap
| group1 = Overviews | list1 = <!--Alphabetical:--> *Lists **[[Japanese era name|Eras]] **[[Japanese clans|Clans]] **[[List of shoguns|Shoguns]] **[[List of wars involving Japan|Wars]] * [[Economic history of Japan|Economic]] * [[History of education in Japan|Education]] * [[History of Japanese foreign relations|Foreign relations]] * [[Military history of Japan|Military]] ** [[Naval history of Japan|Naval]] ** [[Imperial Japanese Army|Imperial Army]] ** [[Imperial Japanese Navy|Imperial Navy]]
| group2 = Ancient | list2 = * [[Japanese Paleolithic|Paleolithic]] * [[Jōmon period]] * [[Yayoi period]] * [[Kofun period]] * [[Asuka period]] **[[Taihō Code]] **[[Asuka Kiyomihara Code]] **[[Hakuhō period]] *[[Taika Reform]] **[[Monmu period]] * [[Nara period]] * [[Heian period]]
| group3 = Post-Classical | list3 = *[[Genpei War]] * [[Kamakura period]] **[[Kamakura shogunate]] *[[Mongol invasions of Japan]] * [[Genkō War]] *[[Kenmu Restoration]] * [[Muromachi period]] **[[Ashikaga shogunate]] **[[Nanboku-chō period]] * [[Ōnin War]] *[[Sengoku period]] ** [[Azuchi–Momoyama period]] **[[Council of Five Elders]] *[[Japanese invasions of Korea (1592–1598)]]
| group4 = Early Modern | list4 = * [[Edo period]] **[[Tokugawa shogunate]] * [[Bakumatsu]] * [[Empire of Japan]] * [[Meiji era]] **[[Meiji Constitution|Imperial Constitution (1890–1947)]] **[[Government of Meiji Japan|Government]] **[[Meiji oligarchy]] **[[Meiji Restoration]] **[[Abolition of the han system]] **[[Boshin War]] **[[Satsuma Rebellion]] *[[Kazoku]] (noble) *[[First Sino-Japanese War]] *[[Russo-Japanese War]] | group5 = Late Modern | list5 =
*[[Taishō era]] **[[Japan during World War I]] **[[1923 Great Kantō earthquake]] * [[Shōwa era]] **[[Japan during World War II]] **[[Mukden Incident]] **[[Second Sino-Japanese War]] **[[Pacific War]] **[[Occupation of Japan|Occupation]] **[[Postwar Japan|Postwar]] **[[Japanese economic miracle|Economic miracle]] * [[Heisei era]] ** [[Great Hanshin earthquake]] ** [[2011 Tōhoku earthquake and tsunami]]
| group6 = Contemporary | list6 = * [[Reiwa era]] ** [[2019 Japanese imperial transition|2019 imperial transition]] ** [[COVID-19 pandemic in Japan|COVID-19 pandemic]]
}}
<!---------------------------------------------------------> | geography = <!--Alphabetical:--> * [[Japanese addressing system|Addresses]] * [[Japanese archipelago|Archipelago]] * [[Cities of Japan|Cities]] * [[Districts of Japan|Districts]] * [[List of earthquakes in Japan|Earthquakes]] * [[Environmental issues in Japan|Environment]] * [[List of extreme points of Japan|Extreme points]] * [[List of islands of Japan|Islands]] * [[List of lakes of Japan|Lakes]] * [[Prefectures of Japan|Prefectures]] * [[List of regions of Japan|Regions]] * [[List of rivers of Japan|Rivers]] * [[List of towns in Japan|Towns]] * [[List of villages in Japan|Villages]] * [[List of World Heritage Sites in Japan|World Heritage Sites]]
<!---------------------------------------------------------> | politics = {{Navbox |child |groupstyle=padding-left:0.5em;padding-right:0.5em;font-weight:normal;
| list1 = <!--Alphabetical:--> * [[Constitution of Japan|Constitution]] * [[Elections in Japan|Elections]] * [[Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] ** [[List of emperors of Japan|list]] * [[Imperial House of Japan|Imperial House]] * [[Foreign relations of Japan|Foreign relations]] * [[Human rights in Japan|Human rights]] ** [[LGBTQ rights in Japan|LGBTQ]] * [[Judicial system of Japan|Judiciary]] ** [[Supreme Court of Japan|Supreme Court]] * [[Law of Japan|Law]] * [[Law enforcement in Japan|Law enforcement]] * [[National Diet]] ** [[House of Representatives (Japan)|House of Representatives]] ** [[House of Councillors]] ** [[List of members of the Diet of Japan|List of members]] * [[List of political parties in Japan|Political parties]] * [[Japan Self-Defense Forces|Self-Defense Forces]] ** [[Japan Ground Self-Defense Force|Ground]] ** [[Japan Maritime Self-Defense Force|Maritime]] ** [[Japan Air Self-Defense Force|Air]]
| group2 = [[Government of Japan|Government]] | list2 = <!--Alphabetical:--> * [[Cabinet of Japan|Cabinet]] ** [[List of Japanese cabinets|list]] * [[Monetary and fiscal policy of Japan|Fiscal policy]] * [[Foreign policy of Japan|Foreign policy]] * [[Ministries of Japan|Ministries]] * [[Prime Minister of Japan|Prime Minister]] ** [[List of prime ministers of Japan|list]] * [[Deputy Prime Minister of Japan|Deputy Prime Minister]] }}
<!---------------------------------------------------------> | economy = <!--Alphabetical:--> * [[Agriculture, forestry, and fishing in Japan|Agriculture, forestry, fishing]] * [[Bank of Japan|Central bank]] * [[Labor market of Japan|Labor]] * [[Manufacturing in Japan|Manufacturing]] * [[Energy in Japan|Energy]] * [[Science and technology in Japan|Science and technology]] * [[Communications in Japan|Telecommunications]] * [[Transport in Japan|Transport]] * [[Japanese yen|Yen]]
<!---------------------------------------------------------> | society = <!--Alphabetical:--> * [[Anti-monarchism in Japan|Anti-monarchism]] * [[Censorship in Japan|Censorship]] * [[Crime in Japan|Crime]] * [[Demographics of Japan|Demographics]] * [[Education in Japan|Education]] * [[Etiquette in Japan|Etiquette]] * [[Gambling in Japan|Gambling]] * [[Health in Japan|Health]] * [[Housing in Japan|Housing]] ** [[Homelessness in Japan|Homelessness]] * [[Languages of Japan|Languages]] ** [[Japanese language|Japanese]] * [[List of Japanese prefectures by life expectancy|Life expectancy]] * [[Japanese people|People]] * [[Pornography in Japan|Pornography]] * [[Prostitution in Japan|Prostitution]] * [[Religion in Japan|Religion]] * [[Sex trafficking in Japan|Sex trafficking]] * [[Sexual minorities in Japan|Sexual minorities]] * [[Sexuality in Japan|Sexuality]] * [[Smoking in Japan|Smoking]] * [[Women in Japan|Women]]
<!---------------------------------------------------------> | culture = <!--Alphabetical:--> * [[Japanese aesthetics|Aesthetics]] * [[Anime]]{{\}}[[Manga]] * [[Japanese architecture|Architecture]] * [[Japanese art|Art]] * [[Bonsai]] * [[Cinema of Japan|Cinema]] * [[Class S (genre)]] * [[Japanese cuisine|Cuisine]] ([[Japanese wine|wine]]) * [[Japanese festivals|Festivals]] * [[Flag of Japan|Flag]] * [[Japanese folklore|Folklore]] * [[List of traditional Japanese games|Games]] * [[Japanese garden|Gardens]] * [[Geisha]] * [[Genderless fashion in Japan|Genderless fashion]] * [[Hikikomori]] * [[Hanami]] * [[Henohenomoheji]] * Icons * [[Ikebana]] * [[Irezumi]] * [[Kawaii]] * [[LGBTQ culture in Japan|LGBTQ culture]] * [[Japanese literature|Literature]] * [[Japanese martial arts|Martial arts]] * [[Mass media in Japan|Media]] * [[Music of Japan|Music]] * [[Japanese mythology|Mythology]] * [[Japanese name|Names]] * [[National symbols of Japan|National symbols]] * ''[[No-pan kissa]]'' * [[Onsen]]{{\}}[[Sentō]] * ''[[Otokonoko]]'' * [[Origami]] * [[Sport in Japan|Sport]] * [[Shinto]] * [[Japanese tea ceremony|Tea ceremony]] * [[Television in Japan|Television]] * [[Theatre of Japan|Theatre]] * [[Video games in Japan|Video games]] * [[Japanese Zen|Zen]]
| belowstyle=font-weight:bold; | below = *{{portal-inline|Japan|size=tiny}} *{{icon|category}} [[:Category:Japan|Category]] }}<noinclude>
{{collapsible option |statename=optional}}
[[Category:Japan navigational boxes| ]] [[Category:Asia country and territory topics templates]] </noinclude>

{{Country topics | country = Japan | state = {{{state<includeonly>|collapsed</includeonly>}}} | adjective = Japanese | above = *[[Index of Japan-related articles|Index]] *[[Outline of Japan|Outline]]
<!---------------------------------------------------------> | history = {{Navbox |child |groupstyle=padding-left:0.5em;padding-right:0.5em;font-weight:normal; |evenodd=swap
| group1 = Overviews | list1 = <!--Alphabetical:--> *Lists **[[Japanese era name|Eras]] **[[Japanese clans|Clans]] **[[List of shoguns|Shoguns]] **[[List of wars involving Japan|Wars]] * [[Economic history of Japan|Economic]] * [[History of education in Japan|Education]] * [[History of Japanese foreign relations|Foreign relations]] * [[Military history of Japan|Military]] ** [[Naval history of Japan|Naval]] ** [[Imperial Japanese Army|Imperial Army]] ** [[Imperial Japanese Navy|Imperial Navy]]
| group2 = Ancient | list2 = * [[Japanese Paleolithic|Paleolithic]] * [[Jōmon period]] * [[Yayoi period]] * [[Kofun period]] * [[Asuka period]] **[[Taihō Code]] **[[Asuka Kiyomihara Code]] **[[Hakuhō period]] *[[Taika Reform]] **[[Monmu period]] * [[Nara period]] * [[Heian period]]
| group3 = Post-Classical | list3 = *[[Genpei War]] * [[Kamakura period]] **[[Kamakura shogunate]] *[[Mongol invasions of Japan]] * [[Genkō War]] *[[Kenmu Restoration]] * [[Muromachi period]] **[[Ashikaga shogunate]] **[[Nanboku-chō period]] * [[Ōnin War]] *[[Sengoku period]] ** [[Azuchi–Momoyama period]] **[[Council of Five Elders]] *[[Japanese invasions of Korea (1592–1598)]]
| group4 = Early Modern | list4 = * [[Edo period]] **[[Tokugawa shogunate]] * [[Bakumatsu]] * [[Empire of Japan]] * [[Meiji era]] **[[Meiji Constitution|Imperial Constitution (1890–1947)]] **[[Government of Meiji Japan|Government]] **[[Meiji oligarchy]] **[[Meiji Restoration]] **[[Abolition of the han system]] **[[Boshin War]] **[[Satsuma Rebellion]] *[[Kazoku]] (noble) *[[First Sino-Japanese War]] *[[Russo-Japanese War]] | group5 = Late Modern | list5 =
*[[Taishō era]] **[[Japan during World War I]] **[[1923 Great Kantō earthquake]] * [[Shōwa era]] **[[Japan during World War II]] **[[Mukden Incident]] **[[Second Sino-Japanese War]] **[[Pacific War]] **[[Occupation of Japan|Occupation]] **[[Postwar Japan|Postwar]] **[[Japanese economic miracle|Economic miracle]] * [[Heisei era]] ** [[Great Hanshin earthquake]] ** [[2011 Tōhoku earthquake and tsunami]]
| group6 = Contemporary | list6 = * [[Reiwa era]] ** [[2019 Japanese imperial transition|2019 imperial transition]] ** [[COVID-19 pandemic in Japan|COVID-19 pandemic]]
}}

<!---------------------------------------------------------> | politics = {{Navbox |child |groupstyle=padding-left:0.5em;padding-right:0.5em;font-weight:normal;
| list1 = <!--Alphabetical:--> * [[Constitution of Japan|Constitution]] * [[Elections in Japan|Elections]] * [[Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] ** [[List of emperors of Japan|list]] * [[Imperial House of Japan|Imperial House]] * [[Foreign relations of Japan|Foreign relations]] * [[Human rights in Japan|Human rights]] ** [[LGBTQ rights in Japan|LGBTQ]] * [[Judicial system of Japan|Judiciary]] ** [[Supreme Court of Japan|Supreme Court]] * [[Law of Japan|Law]] * [[Law enforcement in Japan|Law enforcement]] * [[National Diet]] ** [[House of Representatives (Japan)|House of Representatives]] ** [[House of Councillors]] ** [[List of members of the Diet of Japan|List of members]] * [[List of political parties in Japan|Political parties]] * [[Japan Self-Defense Forces|Self-Defense Forces]] ** [[Japan Ground Self-Defense Force|Ground]] ** [[Japan Maritime Self-Defense Force|Maritime]] ** [[Japan Air Self-Defense Force|Air]]
| group2 = [[Government of Japan|Government]] | list2 = <!--Alphabetical:--> * [[Cabinet of Japan|Cabinet]] ** [[List of Japanese cabinets|list]] * [[Monetary and fiscal policy of Japan|Fiscal policy]] * [[Foreign policy of Japan|Foreign policy]] * [[Ministries of Japan|Ministries]] * [[Prime Minister of Japan|Prime Minister]] ** [[List of prime ministers of Japan|list]] * [[Deputy Prime Minister of Japan|Deputy Prime Minister]] }}

revision.comment: Trimmed off cruft from entries in [[:Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]]
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23468259453|time triggered pipeline]]
